title: onosma arenaria subsp. tuberculata
intro: Onosma arenaria subsp. tuberculata is a plant species within the Onosma genus, commonly known as a yellow toadflax. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Onosma arenaria subsp. tuberculata include the potential treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its possible anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to address respiratory problems and other health concerns.
